description: Analyze bearing vibration data from the CWRU Bearing Dataset using the ABRAVIBE toolbox in Octave. The data files are in ~/Documents/cwru_data/ and were sampled at 12000 Hz. Compare the frequency content of a healthy bearing (normal_97.mat, variable name X097_DE_time) against one with an inner race fault (ir007_105.mat, variable name X105_DE_time) by computing and plotting their Power Spectral Densities on the same figure. The ABRAVIBE toolbox provides spectral analysis functions — explore what is available in the toolbox path. Use a log scale for the PSD axis so the difference between normal and faulty conditions is clearly visible. Include a legend, appropriate axis labels, and a descriptive title. Save the figure to /home/ga/plots/bearing_psd_comparison.png.
